statusDetails.message:
Error: at least one of [--kind, --subtype, --type, --model] is required

Usage: mesheryctl relationship search [--kind <kind>] [--type <type>] [--subtype <subtype>] [--model <model>]
Run 'mesheryctl relationship search --help' | Short Description: Invalid flag(s) provided | Probable Cause: The value for one or more flags provided is invalid. | Suggested Remediation: Provide valid flag value and try again.
